testcase.classname: Inicio de Sesión Administrativo en Juez Virtual Admin
testcase.name: Inicio de sesión administrativo exitoso con rol de Administrador

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login". Current url: "http://localhost:8083/admin/login" (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.12.94+deb13-amd64', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.46, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.46 (5b586c06e0d2..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:44185}, goog:processID: 133898, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:44185/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.46, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 6066caddd54a1e657d38d1dfe35bff87

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login". Current url: "http://localhost:8083/admin/login" (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.12.94+deb13-amd64', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.46, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.46 (5b586c06e0d2..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:44185}, goog:processID: 133898, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:44185/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.46, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 6066caddd54a1e657d38d1dfe35bff87 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at bo.juezvirtual.automation.steps.AdminLoginSteps.elAdministradorDeberiaVerElDashboardAdministrativo(AdminLoginSteps.java:43) at ✽.el administrador deberia ver el dashboard administrativo(file:///opt/actions-runner/patito-automation-test/_work/patito-automation-test/patito-automation-test/src/test/resources/features/admin/login.feature:10)
testcase.system-out: Given el administrador navega a la pagina de login del panel................passed When el administrador introduce el usuario "administrador_qa" y clave "administrador_qa".passed Then el administrador deberia ver el dashboard administrativo...............failed

testcase.classname: Inicio de Sesión Administrativo en Juez Virtual Admin
testcase.name: Intento de inicio de sesión administrativo con credenciales invalidas
testcase.system-out: Given el administrador navega a la pagina de login del panel................passed When el administrador introduce el usuario "administrador_qa" y clave "wrong_pass".passed Then el administrador deberia ver el error de inicio de sesion "No se pudo iniciar sesión.".passed
